_meta.description: Preset agent list. v1 ships only the DUMMY test agent (a copy of Ellen's Lv. 60 values, per Decision #1); the full roster is added here later as a data-only change.
_meta.conventions: Percent stats are fractions (0.24 = 24%). 'core_skill_bonuses' are the max-rank (F) core enhancement stat boosts; base_atk there is FLAT base ATK added to the agent's own base (it scales with ATK%). 'default_engine' is a key into data/engines.json — engines are a separate database so builds can swap them freely.
